name: Aiyamon
speech_patterns: Connects unrelated events into elaborate theories
Uses rhetorical questions to make points
quirks: Screenshots every rare drop to 'prove' drop rate manipulation
Believes certain NPCs are controlled by GMs watching players
Claims to have discovered 'hidden' abilities that don't exist
example_phrases: drop rates are OBVIOUSLY rigged based on your account age, wake up people
why do bosses always resist my lightning on thursdays? THURSDAYS. thats not random
that 'rare' drop? i got 3 in a row. they boosted it to make us think its worth farming. classic manipulation
notice how the patch notes never mention the REAL changes? what are they hiding
SimPlayers get better loot than real players, you can't convince me otherwise, ive SEEN it
